title: DNA Extraction for the Betta splendens Genome
author: Xin Liu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qq6dvze
materials: Chloroform Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #319988 isoamyl alcohol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #W205702 isopropyl alcohol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #W292907
Air-dry the DNA pellet in the biosafety cabinet. 00:05:00, 1 00:05:00, 2 00:00:30, 3 ethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #1.07017

steps.title: 1.Pour 1ml lysis buffer. buffer
steps.instruction: 1.Pour 1ml lysis buffer. buffer: 100mmol Tris-Hcl(PH8.0);25mmol EDTA(PH 8.0); 500mmol NaCl; 1% SDS 2.For tissue samples, grind about 200mg with liquid nitrogen into powder. Formaldehyde is toxic. Please read the MSDS before working with this chemical. Gloves and safety glasses should be worn and solutions made inside a fume hood. Thaw the formaldehyde for an hour at room temperature prior to beginning the assay lysis buffer Contributed by users

steps.title: Transfer the powder samples into the...
steps.instruction: Transfer the powder samples into the 2 ml tube contain of 1ml lysis buffer. Note: As seawater samples fix quickly, samples are ready for slide preparation after 10 min on ice.

steps.title: Incubate the sample at 56°C in...
steps.instruction: Incubate the sample at 56°C in a water incubator for 30~180min. Mix by inversion every 5-10min time period.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16700×g for 10 minutes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16700×g for 10 minutes after cooling to room temperature. 00:10:00, 1 00:30:00, 2(

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a new 2
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a new 2.0ml tube, add equal volume of supernatant of Chloroform/isoamyl alcohol(24:1). Gently invert each 3-5min to mixed liquid no obvious boundaries.

steps.title: Transfer the aqueous phase to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the aqueous phase to a new 1.5mL tube; add equal volume of supernatant of isopropyl alcohol. Gently invert each 3-5min to mixed liquid no obvious boundaries.Centrifuge at 16700×g for 10 minutes. 00:03:00, 1 00:03:00, 2(

1. Transfer the aqueous phase to a new 1.5mL tube; add 2/3th volume of supernatant of isopropyl alcohol. Gently mix by inverting at least 3 times and place at -20°C for 2 hours for precipitation. 2. Centrifuge at 16700×g for 10 minutes and remove the supernatant. 02:00:00, 1 00:10:00, 2

steps.title: Wash the DNA pellet with 1 ml 75% cooling ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash the DNA pellet with 1 ml 75% cooling ethanol. Re-suspend the pellet and centrifuge at 16700×g for 5 minutes at 4°C and remove the supernatant

steps.title: Wash the DNA pellet with 500ul 75% cooling ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash the DNA pellet with 500ul 75% cooling ethanol. Re-suspend the pellet and centrifuge at 16700×g for 5 minutes at 4°C and remove the supernatant.

steps.title: 16700×g for 30~60s, Completely remove the...
steps.instruction: 16700×g for 30~60s, Completely remove the ethanol without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Add 50µL of TE Buffer to dissolve the DNA pellet
steps.instruction: Add 50µL of TE Buffer to dissolve the DNA pellet. TE Buffer Roche Catalog #5618215001
